narrative: Wall Street finished modestly higher after the U.S. Supreme Court struck down President Donald Trump’s sweeping tariffs, which helped stabilize sentiment late in the week despite ongoing trade-policy uncertainty as Trump pledged to pursue tariffs through other avenues.

value_picks.name: Accenture plc
value_picks.why_undervalued: Hit 52-week low amid broader tech selloff and AI disruption fears, trading 34% off highs despite strong fundamentals.
value_picks.bull_case: Accenture's durable consulting franchise and positive FCF position it for recovery as clients ramp AI spending.

value_picks.name: Intuit Inc.
value_picks.why_undervalued: Near 52-week low after cyclical trough in software demand, undervalued relative to growth prospects.
value_picks.bull_case: Intuit's dominant position in SMB accounting software ensures rebound with economic recovery.

value_picks.name: Booking Holdings Inc.
value_picks.why_undervalued: Travel cyclical hit lows on economic slowdown fears, but generated massive FCF.
value_picks.bull_case: Strong balance sheet and network effects drive re-rating as travel demand normalizes.

value_picks.name: JD.com, Inc.
value_picks.why_undervalued: Chinese e-commerce laggard at 52-week low due to macro pressures, low multiple.
value_picks.bull_case: Improving China economy and logistics moat support turnaround.

value_picks.name: Thomson Reuters Corporation
value_picks.why_undervalued: Communication services name near lows on sector rotation away from defensives.
value_picks.bull_case: Essential data services franchise with recurring revenue for steady growth.

momentum_picks.name: Sandisk Corp.
momentum_picks.catalyst: Explosive AI-driven memory demand post-spin-off, massive revenue growth and buybacks.
momentum_picks.risk_reward: High reward from AI tailwinds outweighs volatility in semis.

momentum_picks.name: Ultra Clean Holdings, Inc.
momentum_picks.catalyst: Semiconductor equipment boom from AI infrastructure buildout.
momentum_picks.risk_reward: Favorable as AI capex cycle sustains.

momentum_picks.name: Seagate Technology Holdings
momentum_picks.catalyst: Storage demand surge for data centers amid AI expansion.

momentum_picks.name: Western Digital Corp.
momentum_picks.catalyst: Memory chip recovery and AI-related demand.

momentum_picks.name: Phibro Animal Health Corporation
momentum_picks.catalyst: Strong earnings momentum in animal health sector.

watchlist_updates.detail: Accenture hit new 52-week low of $211.94 on Feb 20, 2026, closing at $215.35 amid software sector weakness.
Intuit hit new 52-week low of $378.90 on Feb 20, 2026, closing at $380.55.
Booking Holdings hit new 52-week low of $3948.53 on Feb 20, 2026, closing at $4076.79.
